heading: Appointment and compensation of staff
label: 8004 Appointment and compensation of staff
text: Except as otherwise provided by law, the Joint Committee shall have power to appoint and fix the compensation of the Chief of Staff of the Joint Committee and such experts and clerical, stenographic, and other assistants as it deems advisable.
notes: Amendments1976— substituted “compensation of the Chief of Staff of the Joint Committee” for “compensation of a clerk” after “appoint and fix the”.Pub. L. 94–455

Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–455section 1907(c) of Pub. L. 94–455section 8001 of this titleOct. 4, 1976
